title: Method and apparatus for generating medium access control protocol data unit based on multiple configured grants in wireless communication system
abstract: The present invention relates to a method of generating a Medium Access Control Protocol Data Unit (MAC PDU) by a UE in a wireless communication system. In particular, the method includes the steps of: receiving configuration information related to multiple logical channels; receiving information related to multiple configured grants; generating the MAC PDU by performing a Logical Channel Prioritization (LCP) for the multiple logical channels based on a PBR value related to an activated grant; and transmitting the MAC PDU to a network.
claims: Claims ( 14 ) A method for generating a Medium Access Control Protocol Data Unit (MAC PDU) by a UE in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: receiving configuration information related to multiple logical channels, wherein the configuration information includes multiple Prioritized Bit Rate (PBR) values for at least one logical channel among the multiple logical channels; receiving information related to multiple configured grants, wherein each of the multiple configured grants is related to one of the multiple PBR values; generating the MAC PDU by performing a Logical Channel Prioritization (LCP) for the multiple logical channels based on a PBR value related to an activated grant, wherein the activated grant is one of the multiple configured grants; and transmitting the MAC PDU to a network. The method according to claim 1, wherein, based on two or more configured grants among the multiple configured grants being activated, the LCP is performed based on a largest PBR value among PBR values related to the two or more configured grants. The method according to claim 1, further comprising: based on detecting a change of a traffic pattern, transmitting assistance information to the network; and receiving an activation command informing activation of a configured grant. The method according to claim 3, wherein the traffic pattern relates to a pattern of uplink traffic; and wherein the assistance information includes at least one of a changed periodicity of the uplink traffic or a changed data rate of the uplink traffic. The method according to claim 1, wherein the configuration information includes at least one PBR value related to a dynamic grant, wherein, based on the dynamic grant being related to a transmission opportunity of the activated grant, the LCP for the multiple logical channels is performed further based on one of the at least one PBR value related to the dynamic grant. A user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system, the UE comprising: at least one transceiver; at least one processor; and at least one computer memory operably connectable to the at least one processor and storing instructions that, when executed, cause the at least one processor to perform operations comprising: receiving configuration information related to multiple logical channels, wherein the configuration information includes multiple Prioritized Bit Rate (PBR) values for at least one logical channel among the multiple logical channels; receiving information related to multiple configured grants, wherein each of the multiple configured grants is related to one of the multiple PBR values; generating a Medium Access Control Protocol Data Unit (MAC PDU) by performing a Logical Channel Prioritization (LCP) for the multiple logical channels based on a PBR value related to an activated grant, wherein the activated grant is one of the multiple configured grants; and transmitting the MAC PDU to a network. The UE according to claim 6, wherein, based on two or more configured grants among the multiple configured grants being activated, the LCP is performed based on a largest PBR value among PBR values related to the two or more configured grants. The UE according to claim 6, wherein the operations further comprise: based on detecting a change of a traffic pattern, transmitting assistance information to the network; and receiving an activation command informing activation of a configured grant. The UE according to claim 8, wherein the traffic pattern relates to a pattern of uplink traffic; and wherein the assistance information includes at least one of a changed periodicity of the uplink traffic or a changed data rate of the uplink traffic. The UE according to claim 6, wherein the configuration information includes at least one PBR value related to a dynamic grant, wherein, based on the dynamic grant being related to a transmission opportunity of the activated grant, the LCP for the multiple logical channels is performed further based on one of the at least one PBR value related to the dynamic grant. An apparatus for a user equipment (UE), the apparatus comprising: at least one processor; and at least one computer memory operably connectable to the at least one processor and storing instructions that, when executed, cause the at least one processor to perform operations comprising: receiving configuration information related to multiple logical channels, wherein the configuration information includes multiple Prioritized Bit Rate (PBR) values for at least one logical channel among the multiple logical channels; receiving information related to multiple configured grants, wherein each of the multiple configured grants is related to one of the multiple PBR values; generating a Medium Access Control Protocol Data Unit (MAC PDU) by performing a Logical Channel Prioritization (LCP) for the multiple logical channels based on a PBR value related to an activated grant, wherein the activated grant is one of the multiple configured grants; and transmitting the MAC PDU to a network. A computer readable storage medium storing at least one computer program comprising instructions that, when executed by at least one processor, cause the at least one processor to perform operations for a user equipment (UE), the operations comprising: receiving configuration information related to multiple logical channels, wherein the configuration information includes multiple Prioritized Bit Rate (PBR) values for at least one logical channel among the multiple logical channels; receiving information related to multiple configured grants, wherein each of the multiple configured grants is related to one of the multiple PBR values; generating a Medium Access Control Protocol Data Unit (MAC PDU) by performing a Logical Channel Prioritization (LCP) for the multiple logical channels based on a PBR value related to an activated grant, wherein the activated grant is one of the multiple configured grants; and transmitting the MAC PDU to a network. A method for receiving a Medium Access Control Protocol Data Unit (MAC PDU) by a base station (BS) in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: transmitting configuration information related to multiple logical channels, wherein the configuration information includes multiple Prioritized Bit Rate (PBR) values for at least one logical channel among the multiple logical channels; transmitting information related to multiple configured grants, wherein each of the multiple configured grants is related to one of the multiple PBR values; and receiving, from the UE, the MAC PDU generated by performing a Logical Channel Prioritization (LCP) for the multiple logical channels based on a PBR value related to an activated grant, wherein the activated grant is one of the multiple configured grants. A base station (BS) in a wireless communication system, the BS comprising: at least one transceiver; at least one processor; and at least one computer memory operably connectable to the at least one processor and storing instructions that, when executed, cause the at least one processor to perform operations comprising: transmitting configuration information related to multiple logical channels, wherein the configuration information includes multiple Prioritized Bit Rate (PBR) values for at least one logical channel among the multiple logical channels; transmitting information related to multiple configured grants, wherein each of the multiple configured grants is related to one of the multiple PBR values; and receiving, from the UE, a Medium Access Control Protocol Data Unit (MAC PDU) generated by performing a Logical Channel Prioritization (LCP) for the multiple logical channels based on a PBR value related to an activated grant, wherein the activated grant is one of the multiple configured grants.
